item.title: How the Carnivore Diet Transformed My Life!
item.description: I found out that people were dropping hundreds upon hundreds of lbs and healing a bunch of autoimmune diseases and stuff by eating only meat, so I gave it a try.

media:content.media:title: How the Carnivore Diet Transformed My Life!
media:content.media:description: I found out that people were dropping hundreds upon hundreds of lbs and healing a bunch of autoimmune diseases and stuff by eating only meat, so I gave it a try.

item.title: Watching the Weirdest Videos Online
item.description: Diving into some of the internet’s strangest videos and reacting to what makes them so memorable.

item.title: This Viral Trend Raises Questions
item.description: Looking at a popular “what ruins your face” trend and why it’s sparking mixed reactions online.

item.title: Rupert Grint’s Strangest Movie
item.description: Breaking down a bizarre Rupert Grint film that takes an unexpected concept in a very bold direction.
